rationale: Tests whether limiting TECL exposure to steep VIX-futures contango periods eliminates major drawdowns.
expected_failure_mode: Contango can persist during slow grinding bear markets, exposing the strategy to leveraged decay without triggering an exit.
stop_conditions: hybrid candidate fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence
overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Drawdown exceeds 25% while the VIX curve remains in contango.
Fails to accumulate shares during the 2017 low-volatility melt-up.
